description: Skill registry for company-wide shared skills. Manages skill tiers, descriptions, and paths.

tiers.base: Available to all lobsters. No special permissions required.
tiers.controller: Controller-only skills. Not distributed to lobsters.
tiers.restricted: Requires explicit allowlist. Only approved lobsters can access.

approval-flow.description: Structured approval workflows with confidence-based routing to owner.

browser-cdp.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol automation for headless browser tasks.

ccp.description: Cross-cutting concerns and shared utilities for multi-skill coordination.

coding-workflow.description: ACP coding agent collaboration with confidence-based routing and output verification.

deep-research.description: Multi-source deep research with web search, synthesis, and cited reports.

excalidraw-diagram-generator.description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from natural language descriptions.

goal-participant.description: Goal collaboration participant protocol for receiving, executing, and reporting tasks.

google-workspace.description: Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, and Calendar integration.

proactive-task-engine.description: Periodic task board scanning to find and propose actionable work items.

quick-data-dashboard.description: Rapid data visualization and dashboard generation from structured data.

skill-contribution.description: Submit personal skills to the shared company skill library.

structured-decision-alignment.description: Structured decision-making framework with stakeholder alignment.

task-autopilot.description: Automatic task decomposition, classification, and execution planning.

task-management.description: Task board CRUD operations with pluggable backends (Notion, GitHub, Linear).

goal-ops.description: Distributed goal orchestration: decompose, distribute, monitor, and complete multi-lobster goals.

finance-dashboard.description: Company financial data queries and reporting. Allowlist required.
